headline: A Look At Lamb Weston (LW) Valuation After Raised 2026 Guidance And Insider Buying
summary: Lamb Weston Holdings (LW) has drawn fresh attention after reporting third quarter earnings, raising its 2026 sales and EBITDA guidance, and seeing sizeable insider and institutional share purchases alongside concerns around margins and international markets. See our latest analysis for Lamb Weston Holdings. Recent news around raised 2026 guidance, insider buying and the ongoing buyback program comes against a mixed backdrop, with a 7 day share price return of 7.22%, a 1 year total shareholder...
